gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.C4 > 10 AND T1.Diagnosis = 'APS'
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID)
FROM Patient AS T1
JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
JOIN Laboratory AS T3 ON T1.ID = T3.ID
WHERE T2.Thrombosis = 1
AND T3.C4 > 10
question: Among the patients have blood clots in veins, how many of them have a normal level of complement 4?
